name: Lightning Helix
oracle_text: Lightning Helix deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.
design_notes: A perfect multicolor design: combines red's direct damage (Lightning Bolt's 3 damage) with white's lifegain. Multicolor cards should feel like a natural blend of both colors' abilities. At 2 mana for 3 damage + 3 life, it's more efficient than either color could achieve alone — the reward for playing two colors. Clean, elegant two-color design.
